decks.notes: The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using creatures like Saruli Caretaker, Wall of Roots, and Gatecreeper Vine. The key strategy is to mill your own deck with Balustrade Spy to put a combination of Generous Ent and Sagu Wildling into play, followed by using Dread Return to bring back Lotleth Giant for a massive finishing blow. The deck also includes cards like Masked Vandal and Mesmeric Fiend for disruption and control. Lots of card draw and creature searching help set up the combo efficiently.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent through a combination of aggressive creatures and burn spells. By playing low-cost creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, along with efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. Additionally, cards like Faithless Looting and Grab the Prize help to maintain card advantage and ensure a steady stream of threats. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and out-damage the opponent in a fast-paced aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board with removal spells and board wipes while generating value through card draw and sacrificing creatures. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by consistently removing threats and disrupting their game plan, while also ensuring a steady stream of resources through card draw and recursion. The deck also aims to maintain a strong board presence with efficient creatures and land recursion, making it difficult for the opponent to establish a dominant position on the battlefield.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures to put pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan with removal spells and hand disruption. By utilizing cheap creatures like Glint Hawk and Thraben Inspector, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of threats while also generating card advantage with cards like Oroku Saki, Shredder Rising and Refurbished Familiar. Supporting cards like Grim Bauble and Thraben Charm provide additional disruption, while Eviscerator's Insight offers a powerful finisher. The deck also includes a mix of lifegain and utility lands to help stabilize against aggressive opponents.

The deck focuses on using Gates to ramp up mana and control the board with efficient removal spells and creatures. It also utilizes lifelink and protection spells to outlast opponents and generate card advantage through recursion and card draw. The deck aims to dominate the late game with powerful threats that are difficult for opponents to deal with, while maintaining a resilient and stable board presence throughout the match.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through the use of Gates and mana ramping while utilizing cards like Sacred Cat and Guardian of the Guildpact to maintain board presence and defense. Outlaw Medic provides additional lifegain, while Midnight Tilling and Journey to Nowhere offer removal options. Malevolent Rumble can clear the board of smaller creatures, and Armadillo Cloak provides a power boost and lifegain. The deck is designed to outlast opponents and establish a strong defensive position while slowly grinding out wins.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By utilizing cards like Nyxborn Hydra and Avenging Hunter, the deck aims to quickly build a threatening board presence. Ramp with Arbor Elf and mana acceleration with Wild Growth and Utopia Sprawl help to power out larger threats earlier in the game. Meanwhile, cards like Ram Through and Malevolent Rumble provide removal options to deal with any opposing threats. The goal is to pressure the opponent and close out the game before they can stabilize.

The main idea of this Mono Blue Aggro deck is to quickly deploy cheap creatures like Delver of Secrets and Tolarian Terror, while also utilizing tempo spells like Force Spike and Counterspell to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck also includes card draw and graveyard synergy with cards like Thought Scour and Cryptic Serpent. With a focus on early aggression and control elements, this deck aims to apply pressure and maintain card advantage to outpace the opponent and secure a victory in a Pauper 1 vs 1 format.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game using a combination of creature removal, protection spells, and utility cards. The Gates help to fix the mana base while also providing additional benefits. Sacred Cat and Lunarch Veteran offer early game defense, while Sneaky Snacker and Outlaw Medic provide additional threats. The Modern Age and Melded Moxite offer card advantage and ramp, while Prismatic Strands and Thraben Charm provide protection and removal. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent to secure the win.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, creature destruction, and card draw. It utilizes a mix of Golgari and Jund cards to create a versatile gameplay experience. The main strategy is to disrupt the opponent's board state while generating card advantage and maintaining board presence through token creatures. The key strength of this deck lies in its ability to adapt to different situations and outvalue opponents over the course of a long game.

The main idea of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Gixian Infiltrator and Writhing Chrysalis, the deck aims to put on early pressure and maintain control of the board through cards like Cast Down and Nihil Spellbomb. The deck also focuses on generating card advantage and mana ramp through cards like Ichor Wellspring and Cleansing Wildfire. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly building up its own board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing efficient creatures such as Glint Hawk, Kor Skyfisher, and Refurbished Familiar to apply constant pressure. The deck also includes card advantage engines like Ichor Wellspring and Lembas to maintain a steady stream of resources. Removal spells like Cast Down and Reckoner's Bargain help control the board while the Orzhov Basilica and Tithing Blade provide additional utility. The deck aims to outpace the opponent in the early game and maintain pressure throughout the match.

The main idea of this Rakdos Aggro deck is to have a fast and aggressive strategy by playing cheap and efficient creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Kitchen Imp, while also using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Grab the Prize and Highway Robbery to maintain card advantage and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of lifelink cards like Vampire's Kiss and Alms of the Vein helps to stabilize the player's life total while pressuring the opponent.

The deck utilizes a combination of efficient card draw and removal spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Augur of Bolas and Archaeomancer provide card advantage, while Mulldrifter and Murmuring Mystic offer threats and token generation. Ephemerate is used to protect key creatures and generate additional value. The deck also includes a variety of counterspells and removal spells like Skred and Thraben Charm to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Additionally, Union of the Third Path allows for additional card advantage and Fanged Flames can serve as a finisher.

This deck focuses on assembling the Urzatron lands (Urza's Mine, Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower) to generate massive amounts of mana and cast powerful, high-cost creatures like Ulamog's Crusher and Maelstrom Colossus. It also utilizes control elements like Relic of Progenitus and Scour from Existence to disrupt opponent's strategies. The deck includes cards like Expedition Map and World Map to help find the necessary Urzatron pieces, along with utility cards like Candy Trail and Haunted Fengraf. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with its mana advantage and large threats.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly build up a strong board presence with low-cost, aggressive white creatures and enhance them with a variety of enchantments to boost their power and toughness. This allows the deck to overwhelm opponents with a swarm of creatures while also providing some protection through cards like Emerge Unscathed and Benevolent Blessing. The deck aims to win the game through a combination of fast, evasive attacks and resilient creatures that are difficult for the opponent to deal with effectively.
